**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level e-commerce proxy deconstruction and the '2-person dehumidifier/electrical box e-commerce shell' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Jiangsu Oulun Electrical,' boasts a business license that reads like a comprehensive catalog of electrical equipment and small appliances: claiming to 'manufacture and produce' everything from high/low voltage distribution boxes and power transmission equipment to wet/dry machines, industrial dehumidifiers, and humidifiers. Augmented by its imposing 'Jiangsu' prefix, the official system directly elevated it to an 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturing Entity.' However, the forensic logic engine ruthlessly stripped away this facade: this purported 'provincial-level manufacturing giant,' claiming 10 million RMB in registered capital, possesses an actual paid-in capital of a pitifully fractional 23,726.17 RMB! Even more fatal, its insured headcount is exactly 2! Its spatial coordinates place it at 'Room 208, Building 4... Maigaoqiao Pioneer Park.' The logical deduction instantly transforms into a deeply ironic reality: operating from a second-floor small office in a pioneer park, the owner and one customer service rep, backed by a mere ~20,000 RMB, claim to have not only established a heavy high-voltage distribution cabinet production line but also concurrently opened a dehumidifier manufacturing plant? The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing, processing, production' facade vocabulary from the license, extracting the ultimately honest phrase at the very end of its scope: 'E-commerce.' The reality is starkly naked and typical of Chinese e-commerce tactics: this is a 100% pure 2-Employee E-commerce Shell & Dehumidifier Proxy Seller operating from a pioneer park. The owner spent ~20k RMB to set up this 'large factory' shell with the sole purpose of opening storefronts on Taobao, JD.com, or 1688 for dropshipping or arbitrage. They likely dropship distribution box components or sell OEM dehumidifiers/humidifiers under the 'Oulun' brand. The official 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturing' tag is the ultimate algorithmic demotion of modern manufacturing.
